description_long: This cafe features a boxy, modern structure with a large, stylized coffee cup sculpture on its flat roof, serving as a prominent visual landmark. The facade includes large rectangular windows and a central door with a small golden handle, flanked by the word 'Coffee' in bold, three-dimensional letters above the entrance. A striped yellow and gray awning extends over an outdoor seating area, which includes a black hexagonal table surrounded by four orange chairs. The side of the building displays additional signage, reinforcing its commercial identity. The overall color palette is dominated by muted browns, grays, and accent colors, giving it a contemporary yet inviting appearance. The design suggests a compact, urban cafe with both indoor and outdoor spaces for patrons.
description: A modern, boxy cafe with a giant coffee cup on the roof, bold 'Coffee' signage, large windows, and a striped awning shading an outdoor seating area.
description_view_0: The rear view shows the plain back wall of the cafe with the large coffee cup sculpture on the roof and side signage visible.
description_view_1: The front view highlights the main entrance, large windows, 'Coffee' signage, striped awning, and outdoor seating area.
description_view_2: The side view displays the striped awning, outdoor table and chairs, and the coffee cup sculpture centered on the roof.
description_view_3: The opposite side view shows the awning, outdoor seating, and the handle of the coffee cup sculpture, with less signage visible.
